programmes.show_description: Meet "The Doctor", who has helped drug dealers, criminals and terrorists move freely across borders, often to deadly effect. We get exclusive access to one of the world's most notorious pass
News and views from around the region, delivered with uniquely Asian perspectives.
Innovative youths in Taiwan launch ground-up initiatives that are transforming traditional industries in their rural hometowns. This episode looks at how they did it and the differences they've made.
Step into Tobyyato's latest artwork, uncover the innovation powering Singapore's farms, plan a wellness-driven escape, and meet the woman transforming fashion waste across continents.
No further information...
For decades, the Middle East has the focus of US foreign policy. With the war in Gaza, the Middle East is leaning from the American pole. How will the pivot to Asia change the dynamics of the region?

Western men are flocking to Asia looking for love. Are these passport bros an update of the sex tourists prevalent in Southeast Asia? Or are they simply lonely men looking for their shot at romance?

A new generation of Vietnamese carves a future they want to own. They're empowering rural communities, and weaving tradition into progress. What will it take to define success on their own terms?
Indonesia's rural economies are transforming, thanks to a new generation of youth. Discover why and how they are seizing the latest opportunities to build a brighter future in their hometowns.
